evaluator_output.reason: Only 2 products meet the minimum battery life requirement of 8 hours, limiting the selection.

final_response:
For a sensational blend of performance and value, the JLab Epic Air Sport ANC Gen 2 is your top pick at just $79. With a staggering 15-hour battery life and active noise cancellation, these earbuds are built to keep you focused during workouts while delivering a punchy sound thanks to the 10mm graphene driver. The cloud foam and gel flex ear tips ensure a comfy fit, making it a no-brainer for anyone who values both audio quality and endurance in their earbuds.

Want something more durable? The Jabra Endurance Peak 3 at $79 offers IP57 waterproof certification, perfect for athletes undeterred by the elements. Need a longer-lasting battery? Check out the Jabra Elite 45h for $99, with an astonishing 50 hours of playback. Craving a unique fit? The Samsung Galaxy Buds Live at $99 provide a comfortable open-ear design that feels as light as air.
